results.title: New: June’s Online Training Events
results.summary: Staying up to date on your professional skill sets is really about making your day-to-day work easier. results.title: SOCOM wants to revive legacy M4 carbine with ‘hypervelocity’ cartridge
results.summary: The elite command asked vendors to double the effective range of the M4 platform with the Hypervelocity Improved Carbine program.

results.title: Trump signs AI executive order after postponement last month
